text:
miwi        2007-04-28 10:58:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science              Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/nifticlib    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    science/nifticlib/files nifticlib.1 patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  NIfTI-1 is a new Analyze-style data format, proposed by the NIfTI DFWG
  as a short-term measure to facilitate inter-operation of functional MRI
  data analysis software packages.
  
  WWW:    http://nifti.nimh.nih.gov/
  
  PR:             ports/112183
  Submitted by:   Jason W. Bacon
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.114     +1 -0      ports/science/Makefile
